ddls:
CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* ID of the industry the company operates in */,
  "ceo" TEXT /* Name of the CEO */,
  "founded" TEXT /* Year the company was founded */,
  "headquarters" TEXT /* Location of the company's headquarters */,
  "website" TEXT /* Company's official website */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector the company belongs to */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the company */,
  "sector_rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the company within its sector */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_companies_industry_id FOREIGN KEY ("industry_id") REFERENCES industries ("industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial data entry */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company */,
  "data_at" TEXT /* Date of the financial data */,
  "revenues" REAL /* Total revenues for the year */,
  "profits" REAL /* Total profits for the year */,
  "market_value" REAL /* Market value of the company */,
  "assets" REAL /* Total assets of the company */,
  "total_stockholder_equity" REAL /* Total stockholder equity of the company */,
  "revenues_increase" TEXT /* Percentage increase in revenues from the previous year */,
  "profits_increase" TEXT /* Percentage increase in profits from the previous year */,
  "earnings_per_share" REAL /* Earnings per share (EPS) */,
  "total_return_for_investors_in_year" TEXT /* Total return for investors in the year */,
  "total_annual_return_for_investors_in_ten_years" TEXT /* Total annual return for investors over ten years */,
  "data_version" TEXT /* Version of the financial data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_data_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "industries" (
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each industry */,
  "industry_name" TEXT /* Name of the industry */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the industry */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector the industry belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_ratios" (
  "ratio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial ratio */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial data entry */,
  "ratio_name" TEXT /* Name of the financial ratio */,
  "ratio_value" REAL /* Value of the financial ratio */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the financial ratio */,
  "ratio_type" TEXT /* Type of financial ratio (e.g. liquidity, profitability, efficiency) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ratio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_ratios_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES financial_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role (e.g. view, edit, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's role */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial data being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES financial_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial report */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial data entry */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the financial report */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the report in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the report was uploaded */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of financial report (e.g. annual, quarterly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_reports_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES financial_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "investment_portfolios" (
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each investment portfolio */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the portfolio */,
  "portfolio_name" TEXT /* Name of the portfolio */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the portfolio was created */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the portfolio */,
  "portfolio_type" TEXT /* Type of portfolio (e.g. tech, energy) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_investment_portfolios_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolio_holdings" (
  "holding_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio holding */,
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* ID of the investment portfolio */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company held in the portfolio */,
  "shares_held" INTEGER /* Number of shares held */,
  "purchase_price" REAL /* Purchase price per share */,
  "current_value" REAL /* Current value of the holding */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date the shares were purchased */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("holding_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_holdings_portfolio_id FOREIGN KEY ("portfolio_id") REFERENCES investment_portfolios ("portfolio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_holdings_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data version */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial data entry */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the data was updated */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes made to the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES financial_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial data entry */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_sources_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES financial_data ("data_id")
)
